对于我们来说，这些世界都是虚假的，但对他们来说，这是他们一直生活的世界，是真实的，美好的，是他们愿意舍命拯救的家园。
非常期待作者后续的更新[雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770199915,"group_id":"7581902917842521150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N39SBaZ9wnWmaz0G5rXRMZQBCLNYBRPdEWhVYi0FrYSU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/600dd03ba370460bbc599edb962354e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792320&x-signature=Y70xCm8piDLWjDDiSRwAX77Fcgo%3D","user_id":"4399577340586680","user_name":"千山白羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4399577340586680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7581902917842521150","book_info":{"abstract":"【动漫规则怪谈（第一个熊出没）＋微恐＋悲壮＋主角有脑＋国运＋无cp】
“别人的童年越来越模糊，我的童年咋越来越邪乎？”
“不是！熊大熊二你咋入编了？喜羊羊你咋也有编制？连海绵宝宝都有了？”
蓝星诡异降临！怪谈席卷全球！
每个国家都会抽取天选者，参加怪谈！
龙国连败七场，一度处在灭国的边缘！
最后一场，怪谈居然还是传说中的S级怪谈副本！
穿越到蓝星的陈庆，得知这个世界怪谈林立，困难重重，本来很慌。
一看怪谈！
狗熊岭怪谈？羊村怪谈？成龙历险记怪谈？比奇堡怪谈……
好家伙！
没想到怪谈全都是自己曾经的童年啊！
那还说啥？都是哥们！
陈庆一点也不慌了。
在怪谈中，陈庆扮演光头强，对着诡异熊大熊二就是干。
“我强天帝，狂一点怎么了？”
在羊村扮演懒大王。
“我懒羊羊大王懒一点怎么了？”
在比奇堡扮演海绵宝宝。
“我准备好啦！我准备好啦！”
在成龙历险记扮演成龙。
“小玉，这个太危险了。”
世界各国：“不是，陈庆为啥每个怪谈，他都能精准扮演角色？呜呜呜，求带！”
……
当陈庆彻底攻克怪谈那一天，怪谈的诡异这才恍然大悟，回想起那普通的一天。
那一天，怪谈世界来了个大爹！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9e086b7188a4f9d1d312cb7133e7c255","author":"故梦的青春","author_id":"","book_id":"7581902917842521150","book_name":"童年动漫都成规则怪谈了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"29万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7581928780927599166","read_count":"289923","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"691384"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"256","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,直播,灵异,无女主,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/649fe3c391d9b8b30e17f93c66f41ac2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449243&x-signature=dKF9HdI7hxhHG086QbK9EvxDO2g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1899551457812359","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192723EA9E4154FCE6F1C999A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
